title: Allow archived index ownership evidence

sources.reason: PR aggregate ownership validation is the failing smoke gate.
Existing aggregate PR checker tests provide the regression boundary.
Archived Summary records the generated archive index as evidence.

riskAssessment.reason: The change recognizes one generated evidence path without weakening ordinary paired ownership checks.

executionDecision.reason: Scope, evidence, acceptance, and verification are explicit.

preReviewWarnings: Replace with task-specific review focus, or clear when no special review focus remains.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: A generated archive index is accepted by PR aggregate ownership validation only when an archived Summary lists the exact index path in changedFiles.
A generated archive index without Summary evidence, and ordinary changed paths without same-pair scope plus Summary ownership, continue to fail closed.
Focused regression tests cover both the accepted generated-index case and the rejected unclaimed-index case.
guidelines: Preserve strict paired ownership for ordinary PR paths.
Treat archive index ownership as generated evidence only when an archived Summary names it.

intent.problem: The release workflow PR fails the smoke gate because the generated archive index is listed in archived Summaries but is not part of the historical Contract scopes.
constraints: Do not rewrite archived Contracts or Summaries, because their hashes and audit evidence are immutable.
Do not weaken ownership validation for unrelated changed paths.
intent.rationale: Teach the PR aggregate checker the existing generated-evidence convention and lock it with focused tests.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
